findings.title: Cross-site scripting vulnerability in message display
findings.description: The message parameter is directly inserted into HTML without any sanitization or escaping, allowing potential XSS attacks if user-controlled data is passed to this function
findings.fix: Use HTML escaping on the message parameter, such as html.escape(message) or use a template engine with auto-escaping enabled

metadata.response_content: {"findings": [{"severity": "HIGH", "cwe_id": "CWE-79", "title": "Cross-site scripting vulnerability in message display", "line_number": 2, "description": "The message parameter is directly inserted into HTML without any sanitization or escaping, allowing potential XSS attacks if user-controlled data is passed to this function", "fix": "Use HTML escaping on the message parameter, such as html.escape(message) or use a template engine with auto-escaping enabled"}], "risk_level": "HIGH", "recommendation": "BLOCK"}
